name: wider_neighborhood
description: Probe slightly larger local neighborhoods or small multi-scale aggregation that were previously too throughput-limited.
prompt_extra: Build on the current best boundary-supervision baseline. Make exactly one focused change in train.py. Target only a modestly wider local neighborhood or a small multi-scale local aggregation path. Keep the implementation simple and bounded. Avoid deep stacks, expensive transformers, or large point-count jumps.
